args.topic: GEO: Optimizing Your Site for AI Search Engines
args.audience: Technical marketers, developers, and site owners who want their content cited by AI search engines

article.title: GEO: Optimizing Your Site for AI Search Engines

competitor_gaps: Most GEO guides stay at the marketing layer and do not explain WAF and IP allowlisting for retrieval bots.
Many articles mention schema but skip SSR rendering and linked entity graphs.
Most guides mention llms.txt as a hack instead of framing it as an optional, low-cost assist.
Few guides connect content structure with query fan-out behavior in Google AI search.

seo.meta_title: GEO: Optimizing Your Site for AI Search Engines
seo.meta_description: Learn how Generative Engine Optimization helps your site get cited by AI search engines with crawl access, clear structure, schema, freshness, and measurement.
